crime.quote: completing the investigation of Giovanni's murder

victim.value: Giovanni - appears to be connected to organized crime figures
victim.quote: completing the investigation of Giovanni's murder

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown - investigation was hindered by criminal types and legal obstacles
culprit_and_motive.quote: criminal types aided by loopholes in the law and outside influences prevented you to arrest those responsible

resolution.value: Investigation appears incomplete - case unsolved through official channels, hints at unofficial resolution
resolution.quote: for every blow in life, there is a counter blow

investigator.value: Captain Robert Wallace - police investigator who conducted the murder investigation
investigator.quote: Captain, how nice to see you again

social_world.value: Criminal organization hierarchy with wealthy patron Gargiulo commanding respect and resources, contrasted with working-class liquor store owner and frustrated police captain
social_world.quote: This place must have cost a million dollars" he said to Lambraca. " Actually it cost over two million

investigator_wound.value: Captain Wallace's frustrated investigation hindered by obstacles, losing key witness, and inability to arrest those responsible despite knowing the truth
investigator_wound.quote: I am well aware of the obstacles that you ran into hindering your investigation

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton counter blow
